author: gcanlin
body: Why do we need to get `cudagraph_mode` in modeling? It would be better to be as an upstream field, i.e. only in model runner and models aren't aware of it.

author: amy-why-3459
body:
> Why do we need to get `cudagraph_mode` in modeling? It would be better to be as an upstream field, i.e. only in model runner and models aren't aware of it.

I completely agree with your point, but other TTS models haven't been adapted yet. Therefore, it will be written in the modeling section first. Could we wait until all TTS models are adapted before making changes?

author: R2-Y
body: Could you add a TODO so that users can configure `cudagraph_mode` themselves in the future?

author: gcanlin
body: Let's add a TODO to enable it in the future. And need to note that it will make mtp seed failed when decode batch > 1. We should refactor the generator in model runner to make it graph safe in a follow-up PR.

author: amy-why-3459
body:
> Let's add a TODO to enable it in the future. And need to note that it will make mtp seed failed when decode batch > 1. We should refactor the generator in model runner to make it graph safe in a follow-up PR.

cc @tzhouam

author: Wallbreazzz
body:
The following code needs to be added to resolve the error on the NPU.
```
platforms:
  npu:
    stages:
      - stage_id: 0
        enforce_eager: false
        compilation_config:
          cudagraph_mode: PIECEWISE
      - stage_id: 1
        compilation_config:
          cudagraph_mode: PIECEWISE
```

author: amy-why-3459
body:
> The following code needs to be added to resolve the error on the NPU.
> 
> ```
> platforms:
>   npu:
>     stages:
>       - stage_id: 0
>         enforce_eager: false
>         compilation_config:
>           cudagraph_mode: PIECEWISE
>       - stage_id: 1
>         compilation_config:
>           cudagraph_mode: PIECEWISE
> ```

Thank you very much for your test. Fixed.
